subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath migrated unto God, until he was illumined by the lights of his Lord's countenance, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی هاجر الی الله الی ان اضاء من انوار وجه ربه العزیز
